title: Buildprint Creator
creator: Agent Buildprint
summary: A classifier-backed Buildprint creator that routes greenfield products to product Buildprints and turns bounded capabilities into valid phased Capability Buildprint packets.
promise: Classifies product vs capability first. For capability work, forces agents to search current internet/docs/source evidence, compare candidate techniques, and choose the best current approach before authoring or asking broad questions.
risks: Authored packets still need dogfooding against real host repos
Vendor-specific implementation quality depends on current source evidence, docs, and benchmark availability
Proof claims must remain conservative until a capability is applied
checks: Greenfield product requests route away from capability authoring
Internet deepsearch selects or downgrades the technique before authoring
Capability is bounded to one reusable promise
Best-practice/current/proven claims are cited or downgraded
Verification and receipt rules are concrete
High-risk packets include contradiction checks and negative proof
10/10 claims require real-host proof and adversarial review

publicStatus.label: Draft authoring workflow
publicStatus.explanation: Used to create real Stripe, RBAC, and API key capability packets; still draft until more host-applied receipts exist.
